title: Solana Transaction History
description: Fetch paginated Solana transaction history via `GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{wallet}/transactions_v3/` — each transaction is decoded with the top-level program name (Jupiter, Raydium, System, Token, etc.), SOL fee paid, success/fail status, block time, and a human-readable summary. Paginate with `page` and `page-size` params. Build a complete Solana activity feed or trading journal without ever parsing raw instruction data.
useCase: Build a decoded Solana transaction activity feed that shows program names, instruction types, fees, and status for any wallet without any raw instruction parsing.

keyParams.address: The Solana wallet address to fetch transaction history for
keyParams.block_signed_at_asc: Set to true for oldest-first ordering, false (default) for newest-first
